comment.body:
They want that. The thing is too with whatever these leaders want to change, they know people don’t change unless the amount of discomfort is 1 degree higher than staying where they’re at and not changing. The world is going to look very different 5-10 years from now, Ray Dalio’s book and video “Changing World Order” does a great job of breaking it down. 

Pain and damage is required in most cases for people and societies to change, because humans are inherently lazy. We tend to react instead of being proactive, just a law of human nature. We live in the best time to be alive, we’ll witness so much change that in the past would take decades or centuries to see. It’s exciting and terrifying at the same time
